series_metadata.series_description: The firm registration applications show the legal basis for registration for CPA and PA firms. Records may include application for registration or renewal of registration, firm employee listings, business letterhead, liability insurance information, peer review compliance documentation, peer review exemption forms, and peer review compliance reporting forms.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: scanned, or three years firm is placed out of business ; Electronic: tax firms, three years firm is placed out of business; peer review firms, six years firm is placed out of business
